text_jp:
…よし！
あいつ等の計画を止める事ができ…！！{END}
text_en: …Good! I managed to stop their plan…!!{END}

text_jp: お前たちの計画は止めたぞ！{END}

しもべどもの計画など…
我が復活すれば造作なきこと…{END}
text_en: My servants' plans are nothing… Once I am revived, it will be a simple matter…{END}

text_jp:
…その為にも、お前のその「力」…
まもなく貰い受けるぞ…{END}
text_en: …And for that purpose, I will soon take that power of yours…{END}
